budget.why: Drop one tablet per liter. EPA registered. The cheap insurance.

allages_cozy.name: Sunday Cook-Off Kit
allages_cozy.story: Pick 3 ingredients, set the timer, everyone cooks. Aprons on, music up, and whoever finishes last does the dishes. Grab these and the competition starts itself.
allages_cozy.editorial: The timer is not optional — it's what makes it feel like a competition instead of Sunday dinner prep. The aprons signal that the cook-off has started.

budget.why: Write the winning recipe down. Thick cardstock, plenty of space.

allages_deep.name: Stargazing Night Kit
allages_deep.story: A star map, something warm to drink, a blanket you can actually lie on, and a camera to capture what you see. Grab these — the sky does the rest.
allages_deep.editorial: You don't need a telescope for your first night. The planisphere teaches you more than an app, and it works without a battery. The thermos is what keeps you outside for hour three.

budget.name: Explore Scientific Double-Sided Multi-Latitude Planisphere Star Map Night Sky Guide for Astronomy
budget.why: Set the date and time. It shows exactly what's overhead tonight.

budget.name: Carson RedSight Red LED Flashlight for Reading Astronomy Star Maps and Preserving Night Vision (SL-22)
budget.why: Set the date and time. It shows exactly what's overhead tonight.

budget.why: 88 constellations on flashcards. Learn a few before you go out.

budget.why: Warm mugs change the energy of the room.

perfect.why: Low-light optics, full-size. The stars get closer.

perfect.why: The astronomy guide that makes sense. Hundreds of objects, easy directions.
